active_sales.name: Steam Summer Sale 2026
active_sales.note: Final 48 hours of the sale (ran June 25–July 9); ideal window for a 'last chance' push on all Steam PC keys already listed on loot.tn (Gothic 1 Remake, F1 25, GTA V Enhanced, Arc Raiders).

active_sales.name: EA SPORTS FC 26 – Festival of Football
active_sales.note: In-game event rewarding a 93 OVR ICON Pelé for players active between June 5 and July 24 is driving demand for FC Points and accounts.

active_sales.name: GTA VI Pre-Orders
active_sales.note: Pre-orders went live June 25, 2026 with Standard/Ultimate editions; PS5 pre-orders are reportedly outselling Xbox by roughly 6-to-1, no PC version confirmed.

new_releases.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
new_releases.why_it_matters: Major campaign-focused Halo remake with 4-player co-op is one of July's biggest Xbox/PC releases and a strong Xbox/Steam key opportunity.

new_releases.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag: Resynced
new_releases.why_it_matters: High-profile Ubisoft remake of a fan-favorite pirate game, expected to drive strong pre-order and launch-week key sales.

new_releases.title: DOOM: The Dark Ages – Revelations DLC
new_releases.why_it_matters: New expansion for a top-selling shooter franchise adds fresh content and levels, a good candidate for a bundled DLC+base game promo.

new_releases.title: EA Sports College Football 27
new_releases.why_it_matters: Annual sports franchise release with a built-in loyal buyer base similar to FC 26, good cross-sell for existing EA account/points customers.

streamer_trends.playing: Returned from hiatus July 6, 2026 launching new 'Streamer University' season
streamer_trends.why_it_matters: His comeback stream is generating massive renewed attention across Twitch/YouTube communities, a good moment to run social ads timed to his content since Kai's audience overlaps heavily with subscription/account buyers.
ARC Raiders remains a top-followed extraction shooter category on Twitch with dedicated large-following streamers, directly matching loot.tn's existing Arc Raiders Steam key + account listing.
FC 26 continues to draw major Twitch viewership, especially around live events like Festival of Football, reinforcing demand for FC Points/account sales already on the homepage.
Both remain top-viewed creators whose frequent collab and variety content keeps general gaming/gift-card interest high among the young, mobile-first audience loot.tn targets.

recommendations.action: Launch a 48-hour 'Steam Summer Sale Final Countdown' banner on loot.tn homepage featuring Arc Raiders, Gothic 1 Remake, F1 25, and GTA V Enhanced Steam keys with a visible countdown timer to July 9.
recommendations.reason: Steam's own Summer Sale ends July 9, 2026, creating urgency loot.tn can mirror to drive last-minute Steam key conversions.

recommendations.action: Add a dedicated 'GTA VI Pre-Order' hero banner clarifying PS5 vs Xbox editions and pricing tiers, plus an FAQ note that no PC version exists yet.
recommendations.reason: GTA VI pre-orders are already live and extremely high-demand, with PS5 significantly outselling Xbox; clear, accurate merchandising will reduce support tickets and capture pre-order traffic.

recommendations.action: Run a time-boxed promo on EA FC 26 Points and FC 26 accounts tied to the 'Festival of Football' in-game event (ends July 24), e.g. 'Get your ICON Pelé before the event ends'.
recommendations.reason: The Festival of Football live event is actively driving FUT engagement and FC Points demand through July 24.

recommendations.action: Feature an 'As Seen on Twitch' badge on the Arc Raiders Steam key/account listing referencing its continued popularity with top extraction-shooter streamers.
recommendations.reason: Arc Raiders remains a heavily-streamed, high-follower category on Twitch, and social proof tied to streamer popularity can boost click-through on the existing product card.

recommendations.action: Prep new product listings/keys for Halo: Campaign Evolved and Assassin's Creed Black Flag: Resynced ahead of their July release dates.
recommendations.reason: Both are among the most anticipated July 2026 releases and represent fresh, in-demand catalog additions loot.tn currently lacks.

recommendations.action: Post a short social media/story tie-in around Kai Cenat's July 6 comeback stream, cross-promoting Twitch-adjacent subscription products (streaming/AI subscriptions like Claude Pro, IPTV, gift cards).
recommendations.reason: Kai Cenat's return is generating a large surge of renewed attention across streaming platforms, offering a timely, low-cost engagement hook.

site_notes: Homepage already smartly surfaces GTA VI pre-orders and Arc Raiders/EA FC 26 key+account bundles; adding urgency elements (countdown timers for the Steam Sale and the FC 26 Festival of Football event) and clearer GTA VI platform/pricing FAQs would convert existing traffic more effectively without needing new catalog work.
